name: CA-EXC-BL-002-Admin-PhishResistantMFA
description: Exception group for CA-BL-002 Require Phishing-Resistant MFA for Admins. Use only for short-lived operational exception handling.

name: CA-EXC-BL-003-User-MFAorManagedSignal
description: Exception group for CA-BL-003 Require MFA or Managed Device Signal for Users. Use for temporary user impact mitigation only.

name: CA-EXC-BL-004-SecurityInfoRegistration
description: Exception group for CA-BL-004 security info registration policy. Use only while resolving registration/location edge cases.

name: CA-EXC-BL-005-DeviceCodeFlow
description: Exception group for CA-BL-005 block device code flow policy. Use only for known incompatible legacy workflows.

name: CA-EXC-BL-006-AuthenticationTransfer
description: Exception group for CA-BL-006 block authentication transfer policy. Use for limited, approved compatibility exceptions.

name: CA-EXC-MG-101-UnmanagedWinBrowser
description: Exception group for CA-MG-101 unmanaged Windows browser block. Use for temporary managed-device onboarding exceptions.

name: CA-EXC-MG-102-UnmanagedWinRichClient
description: Exception group for CA-MG-102 unmanaged Windows rich client block. Use for short-term transition exceptions.

name: CA-EXC-MG-104-UnmanagedWinAdmin
description: Exception group for CA-MG-104 unmanaged Windows admin workstation block. Requires explicit security approval.

name: CA-EXC-E5-403-UnmanagedWinPrivileged
description: Exception group for CA-E5-403 unmanaged Windows privileged workstation block. Requires break-glass level approval.

name: CA-EXC-FL-205-UnmanagedWinFrontlineAdmin
description: Exception group for CA-FL-205 unmanaged Windows frontline admin block. Use only for urgent operational continuity.

name: CA-EXC-BL-015-UntargetedIdentityAdmission
description: Exception group for CA-BL-015 untargeted identity admission control. Use only for short-lived onboarding or group-placement gaps.
